examples: Objective To determine the best plan with penicillamine in treating the patients with hepatolenticular degeneration.
Objective To improve clinicians 'understanding of nephrotic syndrome and myasthenia gravis as adverse events of penicillamine (D-PA).
PURPOSE To compare the efficacy and urinary copper excretion in the treatment of hepatolenticular degeneration (HLD) with penicillamine and zinc.
